title: バンブーのギャル体験

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and I are on our way home when
we run into Daitaku Helios and Gold City.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Helios and City! What are you two
doing here?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Probably the same as you. We're hanging out.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
But running into you guys is giving destiny! You
know you wanna vibe with us, so let's do it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! What exactly are you saying, Helios?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
She's saying we should all hang out. And come to
think of it... even though we're roommates, you
and I hardly ever spend time together. This might
be a good opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! That sounds like fun! Okay, let's all do
something together!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Then let's chill at this place. ☆ As for food, hit me
with that Disciplinary Committee Head
recommendation!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You want me to pick? Um... This is one cool
restaurant... so maybe I should order something
extra cool...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Do you guys want to try this "Ultra Giga
Carrot Hamburger Steak Challenge"?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You wanna try something like that now?! You never change, Bamboo...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you always go HARD, no matter what!
You're a real one, Bamboo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay... I don't really understand, but you're on!
Hehe! I just knew this'd be the best from the
second I saw it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's gooo! Full steam ahead! One, two, three...
GO!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
This kind of song totally suits your vibe, Bamboo.
And you're great at singing.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, even your singing goes hard! ☆ Is this
what peak sounds like?! Wahey heeey!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Aw, thanks! Wahey hey! Let's push it to the limit
and sing one more! Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So this is the nail salon that I've heard so much
about! Ohhh, you can even add words to your
designs!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go with "guts," "red-hot," and
"friendship"! I want something fiery, and in
calligraphy!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Your nail game low-key slaps, Bamboo!
Goated, for real! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It really makes an impression... You may even
start a trend, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You really think so?! You think my design could
be the next big thing?!
choice_data_list: Your taste is certainly... cutting edge.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...!
Do you really mean it?! Hehehe! Wow, even
Trainer agrees!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'll put my cutting-edge sensibilities
to work coming up with some cool designs for you
too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Just leave it to me! We're gonna design the
bestest, most awesomest nails anyone's ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Red stones for red-hot power! Thick chains for
unbreakable bonds! And then... stones of all
colors to represent all our rivals!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And right in the middle, we'll add a big old
cleat-style ring to represent our dreams! There! I
present to you the coolest nails ever!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No, sorry, but let's hold on... There's no way the
other trainers and instructors are going to be
okay with this, is there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Gold City's help, I manage to avoid ending
up with nails that look like some kind of video
game claw weapon!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Woo! Today was high-key amazing! Banger after
banger, for real! This is why you're the GOAT,
Bamboo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It was hectic, but it was a lot of fun. I'll see you
back at the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! See you back at the academy! Don't break
curfew, now!
choice_data_list: You really cut loose today, huh?
You really cut loose today, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh? Hehe, maybe. I guess I overdid it a bit, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You're not... angry, are you?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whew! That's a relief! Anyway, sorry about that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...I've always kind of been this way. It's like some
kind of switch flips in my brain as soon as I get a
compliment.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I get all carried away and I feel like I want to show
everyone something even more amazing!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's why, even if starts out as a compliment, I
usually end up getting told off... Haha.
Embarrassing, right?
choice_data_list: Going all-in is a good thing!
Going all-in is a good thing!

Don't worry. If you start to overdo it, I'll stop
you.

Don't worry. If you start to overdo it, I'll stop
you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's why, even if starts out as a compliment, I
usually end up getting told off... Haha.
Embarrassing, right?
choice_data_list: Going all-in is a good thing!
Going all-in is a good thing!

Don't worry. If you start to overdo it, I'll stop
you.

Don't worry. If you start to overdo it, I'll stop
you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's what I thought! If you're gonna do
something, you gotta go for broke! All right! I'm
going to put this lesson to action and write some
passionate words on my nails tomorrow!
choice_data_list: You might not want to do that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once she gets an idea, she sticks with it. That
kind of sincerity may be the reason why she has a
habit of getting out of hand.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Reliable as ever, Trainer! Then, I'm counting on
you! Don't hesitate to tell me if I ever get out of
hand!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite getting a bit out of hand earlier, Bamboo
Memory is already back to her normal, honest
self.
